name: Hillsborough County Public Schools
about: Hillsborough County Public Schools is the 8th largest school district in the United States, serving approximately 224,000 students in the Tampa Bay area of Florida.
calendarNotes: Hillsborough County Public Schools is Florida's third-largest district and serves the Tampa Bay metropolitan area with one of the earliest school year starts in Florida — typically the first or second week of August. Families new to Tampa should note that August marks the height of hurricane season, and the district has an established school closure policy for weather events that can add makeup days at the end of the year. Spring Break falls in mid-March. If you're planning activities around Tampa Bay Buccaneers games or Gasparilla events, cross-reference your schedule against this calendar. Summer break is longer than in many states, running from late May through early August.
